span.p: resolve_chain returns {bob_profile}\nwhich looks valid — it IS in the index

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
But bob_profile's OUTGOING edges
are NOT in alice's index
Only bob_profile's INCOMING edges
were mirrored at write time

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Result: [] returned as valid answer\nNot None → no fallback triggered

span.p: cross_root_resolve enabled:\nresolve_chain_cross_root() hops to\nbob_index for hop 2

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
cross_root_resolve disabled:
resolve_chain(bail=True)
hits foreign bob_profile → returns None
→ legacy edge-walk (correct)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
idx.resolve_chain(origin_ids, chain[:-1])

⚠️ bail_on_intermediate_foreign = False (default)
⚠️ No cross_root_resolve check
⚠️ Plain single-index resolution

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Hop 1: (Follow, Profile, OUT)\nAlice's index finds bob_profile\n(it's in Alice's index because Follow edge was mirrored)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: bob_profile is FOREIGN (owner_root = bob_root)\nbut resolve_chain doesn't check owner_root\nwithout bail flag — silently continues

span.p: Has slice + no post_filter → ORDERED path chosen

span.p: Step 1: BUCKETS — look up bob_profile's bucket\nfor outgoing Tweet-type neighbors

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Alice's buckets have NO outgoing edges\nfrom bob_profile to any Tweet.\nBob's Post edges live in Bob's index only.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Step 2: ADJ_LIST walk finds nothing matching

display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⚠️ SILENT UNDERCOUNT

returns [] (empty list)
not None

execute_path returns []
refs() treats [] as valid result
legacy edge-walk NOT triggered

svg.text: Diagram 5: The Ordered Path — Cross-Root Gap
